title: feat: add p0 reaction dispatch dry-run adapter boundary
goal: Add local/internal dry-run adapter boundary preview metadata from an active lease and reviewed attempt plan without external adapter execution.

risks.risk: Accidental external adapter execution from dry-run boundary endpoint.
risks.mitigation: Endpoint returns safe preview metadata only; tests assert no runtime, adapter, IRIS Core, VOXWEAVE, TTS, Live2D, renderer, OBS, or WebSocket execution.

risks.risk: Raw message, payload, wallet, secret, private URL, adapter URL, or webhook URL exposure.
risks.mitigation: Projection returns hashes, statuses, and reason codes only; tests assert forbidden raw strings are absent.

risks.risk: Dry-run preview mutates support, outbox, lease, or attempt plan state.
risks.mitigation: Handler does not call repository write methods or audit writes; tests compare stored state before and after.

risks.risk: Committed local evidence must be refreshed with PR current-head GitHub run and artifact IDs.
risks.mitigation: Refresh PR evidence after PR creation, then confirm same-head CI, contracts, quality-gate, and safe artifact.
